Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Book: The Emerging Science of Machine Learning Benchmarks 53 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Show HN: I built 48 lightweight SVG backgrounds you can copy/paste 97 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. OpenRocket 338 upvotes, 67 comments
  4. Using calculus to do number theory 99 upvotes, 17 comments
  5. Write up of my homebrew CPU build 225 upvotes, 48 comments
  6. On a Boat 111 upvotes, 22 comments
  7. Nightingale – open-source karaoke app that works with any song on your computer 456 upvotes, 136 comments
  8. Celebrating Tony Hoare's mark on computer science 119 upvotes, 30 comments
  9. FBI is buying location data to track US citizens, director confirms 259 upvotes, 80 comments
  10. Snowflake AI Escapes Sandbox and Executes Malware 208 upvotes, 65 comments
  11. Wander – A tiny, decentralised tool to explore the small web 151 upvotes, 49 comments
  12. 2025 Turing award given for quantum information science 71 upvotes, 20 comments
  13. Show HN: Hacker News archive (47M+ items, 11.6GB) as Parquet, updated every 5m 253 upvotes, 107 comments
  14. Despite Doubts, Federal Cyber Experts Approved Microsoft Cloud Service 412 upvotes, 186 comments
  15. Rob Pike’s Rules of Programming (1989) 786 upvotes, 391 comments
  16. A ngrok-style secure tunnel server written in Rust and Open Source 68 upvotes, 27 comments
  17. Death to Scroll Fade 325 upvotes, 172 comments
  18. Explore 19th Century Scientific Correspondence 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) 127 upvotes, 65 comments
  20. CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root 70 upvotes, 36 comments
  21. Nvidia NemoClaw 200 upvotes, 145 comments
  22. Nvidia greenboost: transparently extend GPU VRAM using system RAM/NVMe 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  23. Show HN: Playing LongTurn FreeCiv with Friends 32 upvotes, 17 comments
  24. Warranty Void If Regenerated 59 upvotes, 38 comments
  25. Show HN: Tmux-IDE, OSS agent-first terminal IDE 45 upvotes, 29 comments
  26. Review: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra 45 upvotes, 35 comments
  27. Show HN: Will my flight have Starlink? 121 upvotes, 120 comments
  28. OpenAI Has New Focus (on the IPO) 96 upvotes, 110 comments
  29. Trevor Milton is raising funds for a new jet he claims will transform flying 68 upvotes, 107 comments
  30. Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework 82 upvotes, 136 comments

Last generated 6:30am, 19 March 2026. Source here.
